title: IP Address Query
description: IP location, ISP, timezone, with map preview
usage1: Your public IP is queried automatically on load.
usage2: Query any public IPv4 for location, ISP, and more.
usage3: Results include coordinates and a map preview.
usage4: Queries use a public API; no history is stored.
errorInvalid: Please enter a valid IPv4 address
errorQuery: Query failed, check the IP address
